central.one_platform_for_every_support_workflow: One platform for every support workflow
central.plans_that_grow_with_your_team: Plans that grow with your team
central.india_pricing_hint: Show INR pricing to visitors detected in India and charge Indian cards in INR via Razorpay. Everyone else sees your base currency. India is detected automatically.
central.hi_my_subscription_payment_failed_but_i_: Hi, my subscription payment failed but I was still charged...
central.i_can_see_the_duplicate_charge_refunding: I can see the duplicate charge — refunding now and extending your plan by 7 days.
central.yes_annual_plans_save_20_i_can_send_deta: Yes! Annual plans save 20%. I can send details to your email.
central.save_up_to_2_months_with_annual_billing: Save up to 2 months with annual billing
central.faster_first_response_with_unified_inbox: Faster first response with unified inbox
central.fewer_repeat_tickets_with_kb_deflection: Fewer repeat tickets with KB deflection
central.run_support_like_a_well-oiled_machine: Run support like a well-oiled machine
central.every_conversation_becomes_a_trackable_t: Every conversation becomes a trackable ticket with ownership, priority, SLA timers, and full history — merge, split, and collaborate without losing context.
central.email_live_chat_sms_and_your_branded_por: Email, live chat, SMS, and your branded portal all feed the same queue. Multi-brand routing keeps each customer experience isolated.
central.publish_a_searchable_knowledge_base_rout: Publish a searchable knowledge base, route structured requests through a service catalog, and let AI suggest articles before customers submit.
central.route_tickets_automatically_apply_macros: Route tickets automatically, apply macros, chain multi-step workflows, and let AI draft replies so agents focus on complex issues.
central.full_itsm_on_top_of_your_helpdesk: Full ITSM on top of helpefi
central.enterprise_teams_get_itil-style_workflow: Enterprise teams get ITIL-style workflows — type queues, approvals, change management, problem records, and major incident war rooms — without a separate tool.
central.role-based_access_crm_context_enterprise: Role-based access, CRM context, enterprise integrations, SSO, and billing that grows with your team — each workspace on its own isolated subdomain.
central.manage_email_chat_sms_and_portal_request: Manage email, chat, SMS, and portal requests in one helpdesk with merge, split, views, and collision detection.
central.split-pane_queue_conversation_and_detail: Split-pane queue, conversation, and details sidebar with real-time updates and reply-in-progress warnings.
central.embed_a_chat_widget_on_your_site_and_rec: Embed a chat widget on your site and receive SMS via Twilio — every conversation becomes a ticket instantly.
central.publish_help_articles_with_semantic_sear: Publish help articles with semantic search, locale support, and a branded self-service portal for customers.
central.structured_request_types_on_your_portal_: Structured request types on your portal with per-item approval workflows and automatic ticket creation.
central.itil_type_queues_change_calendar_problem: ITIL type queues, change calendar, problem linking, catalog approvals, and major incident war rooms on Enterprise.
central.set_response_targets_escalation_rules_te: Set response targets, escalation rules, team SLAs, and operating hours with visual countdown timers.
central.multi-step_automation_chains_canned_resp: Multi-step automation chains, canned responses, auto-assignment, webhooks, and approval triggers.
central.draft_replies_summarize_threads_surface_: Draft replies, summarize threads, surface KB articles for agents, and deflect customers before they submit.
central.measure_satisfaction_on_portal_and_email: Measure satisfaction on portal and email, build saved reports, and schedule weekly digests to leadership.
central.run_multiple_brands_with_separate_portal: Run multiple brands with separate portals, inboxes, KB skins, and routing from one helpdesk.
central.connect_slack_jira_linear_hubspot_salesf: Connect Slack, Jira, Linear, HubSpot, Salesforce, Shopify, Teams, and custom webhooks.
central.track_hardware_and_software_assets_link_: Track hardware and software assets, link them to contacts and tickets, and enrich from MAC vendor data.
central.track_customers_companies_vip_tags_activ: Track customers, companies, VIP tags, activity timelines, and CRM context in the ticket sidebar.
central.two-factor_authentication_saml_oidc_sing: Two-factor authentication, SAML/OIDC single sign-on, role permissions, audit logs, and data retention.
central.organize_agents_into_teams_and_departmen: Organize agents into teams and departments with skills routing, performance insights, and workload visibility.
central.enter_your_workspace_url_to_open_the_age: Enter your workspace URL to open the agent login for your team.
central.well_send_you_to_your_teams_login_page: We'll send you to your team's login page.
central.prefills_the_sign-in_form_on_your_worksp: Prefills the sign-in form on your workspace.
central.get_full_access_during_your_trial_when_i: Get full access during your trial. When it ends, pick a plan that fits your team — no commitment until then.
central.name_and_url_for_your_team: Name and URL for your team
central.modern_customer_support_software_tickets: Modern customer support software — tickets, chat, knowledge base, and automation in one helpdesk built for growing teams.
central.built_different_title: Support, IT, and customer context — unified
central.built_different_subtitle: Most teams stitch together an inbox, a knowledge base, a CRM sidebar, and a separate ITSM product. {brand} brings the workflows that usually live in four tools into one helpdesk your agents actually enjoy using.
central.diff_support_itsm_title: Support and ITSM in one place
central.diff_support_itsm_body: Turn on Service Desk when you need ITIL-style queues, change calendars, approval workflows, problem records, and major incident war rooms — without migrating to another product.
central.diff_customer_360_body: See CRM profiles, recent Shopify orders, health scores, and a unified activity timeline beside the conversation — no tab switching to another system.
central.diff_asset_discovery_body: Scan your network, import devices as assets, and link hardware and software records directly to tickets and service catalog requests.
central.diff_skills_sla_body: Route tickets to agents with the right skills and apply SLA policies by team or customer tier — not just one global timer for everyone.
central.diff_multi_brand_body: Run separate portals, inboxes, knowledge bases, and ticket forms for each brand from a single agent workspace.
central.diff_custom_domain_body: Every team gets a dedicated workspace URL on signup. Connect your own support domain on Enterprise for a fully branded experience.
central.diff_semantic_kb_body: Vector search surfaces the right articles before customers submit. AI deflection on the portal and live chat reduces repeat questions.
central.diff_realtime_body: Live ticket updates, agent presence, and collision warnings so two people never reply to the same customer at once.
central.diff_performance_body: Track how agents perform against SLAs and CSAT with built-in scoring — no separate workforce analytics tool required.
central.diff_catalog_approvals_body: Publish structured request types on your portal with custom fields, then route them through multi-step approvals before work begins.

seo.home_description: Cloud-hosted helpefi for growing teams: shared inbox, live chat, knowledge base, SLA automation, AI deflection, and Service Desk ITSM in one helpdesk. Start a {days}-day free trial.
seo.register_description: Create your dedicated {brand} workspace in minutes. Full platform access for {days} days — tickets, chat, knowledge base, automation, and more. No credit card required.
seo.login_description: Sign in to your {brand} workspace. Enter your team URL to open the agent login for your organization.
seo.trial_offer: {days}-day free trial with full platform access
